note: BRAIN layer — signal assignments for enrichment waterfall. Day 9 of campaign. Expanding to Scarborough (new territory) per Week 2 plan. East Yorkshire leads 49-56 carried to HANDS yesterday — status notes included below. New batch: leads 57-61, Scarborough + East Riding extension.

carried_forward_status.lead_51: blocked_no_email — crawl found only contact form, no direct email
carried_forward_status.lead_53: blocked_no_email — Rightmove/Zoopla agent page shows only office phone
carried_forward_status.lead_54: blocked_no_email — Facebook page bio empty, no email listed

leads.signal_text: scarboroughbayplumbing.co.uk loads over HTTP — Chrome shows 'Not Secure' warning to every visitor, including homeowners searching for an emergency plumber
leads.pain_point: Website lacks SSL certificate — browsers show 'Not Secure' warning
leads.notes: Owner name known (Mike Rawlings). Strong profile — 4.6★, 54 reviews. Try mike@scarboroughbayplumbing.co.uk. SSL angle identical to Thornfield Electricals which performed well.

leads.signal_text: Solicitors site on HTTP with no mobile support — clients submitting enquiry forms over an unencrypted connection, with GDPR implications
leads.pain_point: Website lacks SSL certificate — browsers show 'Not Secure' warning on a site collecting client enquiries
leads.notes: No owner name — try contact page for solicitor name. GDPR compliance angle is particularly potent for legal firms — they know the risk. Do NOT use first name in subject (none known). PAS framework.

leads.signal_text: scarboroughroofing.co.uk serves over HTTP — domestic customers researching a roofer see a 'Not Secure' warning before reading a single review or testimonial
leads.pain_point: Website lacks SSL certificate — browsers show 'Not Secure' warning
leads.notes: Owner name Tony Shields — try tony@scarboroughroofing.co.uk. Domestic trades where homeowners do background checks — same trust angle as East Riding Electrical.

leads.signal_text: Website fails mobile test — furniture buyers increasingly browse on mobile, especially when starting a room redesign on the sofa
leads.pain_point: Website not mobile-friendly — losing mobile visitors during browsing phase
leads.notes: Owner name (James Hewitt) known. Mobile failure for a visual showroom business — shoppers browse furniture on mobile before visiting. BAB framework: before = bad mobile experience loses you, after = clean mobile site keeps them to booking a visit.

leads.signal_text: Facebook page active but no website — tourist visitors searching online for fish and chips in Filey get no results from this business
leads.pain_point: No website found — social media presence not converting tourist traffic
leads.notes: BELOW 50 THRESHOLD — deprioritise. Only enrich if owner name and email trivially findable from Facebook. Tourist seasonal business — angle is summer visitors converting. Hold until higher-priority leads in batch are enriched.

enrichment_summary.notes: Scarborough is fresh territory — no existing touchpoints. SSL signal leads again. Lead 61 (Filey Fisheries) below score threshold — hold until batch 57-60 enriched. Priority today: enrich 57 and 58 (both have crawlable contact pages likely).
